name: Trigger.dev
description: Trigger.dev open-source background jobs and workflow automation platform

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Trigger.dev
2. Go to Settings → Personal Access Tokens
3. Generate a new token
4. Paste it below

credentialFields.label: Personal Access Token
credentialFields.helpText: Trigger.dev → Settings → Personal Access Tokens → Generate Token

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists Trigger.dev projects to verify developer access
